subject: [PATCH 03/10] nfsd: serialize nfsd4_end_grace() with atomic test-and-set

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledged a concern about using try_cmpxchg() on all platforms and agreed to add a new flags unsigned long to struct nfsd_net to address the issue.
reviews.raw_body:
Ok, I'm convinced. What I think I'll do is add a new flags unsigned
long to struct nfsd_net and we can convert most of the bools in that
struct to use it instead.
-- 
Jeff Layton <jlayton@kernel.org>

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch fixes partial-write detection in the nfsd_direct_write function, which is responsible for handling NFS file writes. The issue arises from vfs_iocb_iter_write() potentially returning a short write, and this patch ensures that the correct behavior is maintained even in such cases.
